zh.Västergötland, Sweden: 瑞典維亞斯特格特藍德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Fredkulla of Sweden於1080年之後出生時，她的父親Inge Stenkilsson8951歲，母親Helena, Queen of Sweden8935歲。她於1105年與Niels of Denmark結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1130年11月4日。

zh-hans.Västergötland, Sweden: 瑞典維亞斯特格特藍德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Fredkulla of Sweden于1080年之后出生时，她的父亲Inge Stenkilsson8951岁，母亲Helena, Queen of Sweden8935岁。她于1105年与Niels of Denmark结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1130年11月4日。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English female personal name Margaret, which is derived via French from Greek margaritēs ‘pearl’.

variants.name: Morgret
meanings: German (Lower Saxony): variant of Margret, a habitational name from any of the places called Margareth(en), which in turn are named with the female saint's name Margaretha, see Margaret .
Americanized form of German   Marquardt  . Compare   Morgart  .

variants.name: Pogson
meanings: English (Yorkshire): metronymic from the Middle English female personal name Pog, a variant of Mog, a pet form of Margaret .

variants.name: Metten
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German August, Hans.
German: habitational name from a place called Metten in Westphalia.
Flemish (Belgian Limburg) and Dutch: metronymic from the female personal name Mette, a pet form of Margaretha (see Margaret ).

variants.name: Margot
meanings: French and English: from the French and Middle English female personal name Margot, a pet form of French Marguerite, English Margaret . In England it is in part of Huguenot origin.

English: occasionally perhaps from the Old French male personal name Margot (ancient Germanic Margot, composed of the elements marh- ‘war horse’ or mar- ‘famous’ + got-, the base of the ethnic name ‘Goth’).

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Sweden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch (Van Sweeden): variant of Van Zweeden, a habitational name for someone from Sweden.
Probably also an altered form of Norwegian   Sween   or possibly Irish   Sweeten  , or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Sween
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened form of   McSween  .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Fredkulla of Sweden was born after 1080, her father, Inge Stenkilsson, was 8951 and her mother, Helena, Queen of Sweden, was 8935. She married Niels of Denmark in 1105. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 4 November 1130.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Fredkulla of Sweden est née après 1080, son père, Inge Stenkilsson, avait 8951 ans et sa mère, Helena, Queen of Sweden, avait 8935 ans. Elle a épousé Niels of Denmark en 1105. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 4 novembre 1130.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Fredkulla of Sweden nach 1080 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Inge Stenkilsson 8951 und ihre Mutter Helena, Queen of Sweden 8935. Sie hat 1105 Niels of Denmark geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 4. November 1130.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Fredkulla of Sweden è nata il dopo il 1080, sua padre, Inge Stenkilsson, aveva 8951 anni e sua madre, Helena, Queen of Sweden, aveva 8935 anni. Lei sposato Niels of Denmark nel 1105. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 4 novembre 1130.

ja.Västergötland, Sweden: スウェーデンvaステルグoトランド
ja.County Down, Ireland: アイルランドコウントイ ダウン
ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Fredkulla of Swedenが1080年以後に生まれた時，父Inge Stenkilssonは8951歳，母Helena, Queen of Swedenは8935歳であった。1105年にNiels of Denmarkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1130年11月4日に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Fredkulla of Sweden(이)가 1080년 이후에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Inge Stenkilsson(은)는 8951세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Helena, Queen of Sweden(은)는 8935세였다. 그녀는 1105년 Niels of Denmark(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1130년 11월 4일 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Fredkulla of Sweden nasceu após 1080, seu pai, Inge Stenkilsson, tinha 8951 anos e sua mãe, Helena, Queen of Sweden, tinha 8935 anos. Ela casou-se com Niels of Denmark em 1105. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 4 de novembro de 1130.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Fredkulla of Sweden родилась после 1080 г., её отцу по имени Inge Stenkilsson было 8951 год, а матери, которую звали Helena, Queen of Sweden, 8935. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Niels of Denmark в 1105 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 4 ноября 1130 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Fredkulla of Sweden nació después de 1080, su papá, Inge Stenkilsson, tenía 8951 años y su mamá, Helena, Queen of Sweden, tenía 8935 años. Se casó con Niels of Denmark en 1105. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 4 de noviembre de 1130.
